summary: A recorded Fox News segment ('FOX NEWS ALERT') in which anchor Harris Faulkner interviews DHS Asst. Secretary Tricia McLaughlin (remote, in front of a U.S. flag and DHS seal) about a New York Times report ('THE SELF-DEPORTERS') and a poll showing 58% support for Trump deportation efforts, with B-roll of migrants in Denver. Audio is the anchor and official talking, no music. This is a cable-news interview, not youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: RPT: MORE IMMIGRANTS OPEN TO SELF-DEPORTATION; POLL: 58% SUPPORT TRUMP DEPORTATION EFFORTS; The New York Times - THE SELF-DEPORTERS; FOX NEWS ALERT
